expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: SKILL.md, README.md, reference.md, and AGENTS docs stay aligned
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states scope/focus includes “SKILL.md”, “README.md”, “reference.md”, and “(and any AGENTS docs — not provided in evidence)”. It also includes a dedicated section: “### 3) AGENTS docs alignment cannot be verified from provided evidence”, showing AGENTS alignment was part of the explicit focus even though it could not be assessed.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase docs
expectations.evidence: The output stays within the docs-phase contract-check scope and bases conclusions on provided docs evidence. result.md: “Primary phase under test: **docs** (documentation consistency / contract sync).” It then provides evidence-based comparisons across the docs artifacts and an advisory verdict, without introducing non-docs-phase requirements.
